title: Midyaniy #4084
definition:
Midianite = see Midian "strife"

 1) a member of the tribe of Midian
 2) an inhabitant of the land of Midian
nasbUsage:
Definition: Midianite = see Midian "strife"

 1) a member of the tribe of Midian
 2) an inhabitant of the land of Midian

    NASB:  a desc. of Midian
